title: NRMC
description: A bunch of client-side mods and resource packs I enjoy playing with
body:
## What is NRMC?
NRMC (stands for _No Rest in Minecraft_, a re-phrased Doom (1993) chapter name (_No Rest for the Living_)) is an invite-based Minecraft survival multiplayer server which rules are faintly defined in three policies: minimal intervention, self-moderation and invitation responsibility. The server is mostly vanilla with only optional client-side mods that introduce convenient gameplay changes. The server's configuration is 90% open-source and all the datapacks and plugins installed on the server are required to be open-source as well.

## The modpack
I have been playing on mainly just two servers since 2018, and during this time I've collected a hefty collection of mostly client-side mods that improve the game's look, performance and introduce some convenient gameplay points that the vanilla game severely lacks.  


This modpack is basically a mod-dump which you can install-and-forget starting, say on NRMC or an another server, the choice is all yours!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NSJzF4qs/images/d6cf0644c7b9118094868ca13c037061d176ba68.png)
